rationale: Weights are the final-day allocation from a real A2C policy (upstream FinRL's own DRLAgent wrapping stable_baselines3.A2C), trained live for 3000 timesteps on NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, TSLA, SPY, QQQ, JPM, XOM, JNJ, TLT, GLD, CASH's real yfinance history from 2025-01-02 to 2026-07-06 (upstream's own StockPortfolioEnv reward = portfolio value, upstream's own softmax weight normalization — no pretrained checkpoint was available or used). Trailing 30-day equal-weight realized return -0.07% → heuristic regime label SIDEWAYS.
